title: An Antarctic Mystery
author: Jules Verne
description: ules Verne's sequel to Poe's classic The Narrative of Arthur Gordon Pym of Nantucket. ??? ?A captain seeking a lost brother. ??? ?A sailor obsessed with redemption as he hides a dark secret. ??? ?A wealthy onlooker intrigued by possibility. ??? ?Brought together by coincidence, they embark on a journey into the uncharted waters of the Antarctic. ??? ?Jules Verne weaves a story of exploration, adventure, and mystery in this exciting tale.
